title: Accenture India Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Accenture India Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Accenture India Global Group has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Ghaziabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Accenture India Global Group:
Accenture India Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accenture India Global Group!
